test.notes: Targeted tests pass for state_machine (34), scheduler (28), policy (50), task_graph (25)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document policy engine testing patterns in the Rust skill. The policy engine is a complex component that would benefit from documented testing patterns for policy parsing, evaluation, and deny-first semantics.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: orchestration-fix-policy-ask review noted the Rust skill covers ownership, borrowing, strings, errors, iteration, concurrency, and memory patterns but not domain-specific testing patterns for the policy engine.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document serde enum variant handling conventions when adding new variants to enums that use #[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")]. Workers need to know that new enum variants require proper case naming.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: orchestration-fix-policy-ask review noted that when PolicyEffect::Ask was added, the worker needed to ensure the serde rename_all annotation covered the new variant correctly.
